nodes.name: A cada 5 minutos
nodes.notes: [ML-COMERCIAL] Verifica conversas encerradas prontas para anÃ¡lise

parameters.query:
SELECT
  s.id          AS sessao_id,
  s.remote_jid,
  s.area,
  s.total_mensagens,
  s.iniciada_em,
  s.agente_humano_id,
  array_agg(
    COALESCE(m.conteudo_raw, t.texto)
    ORDER BY m.created_at
  ) FILTER (WHERE COALESCE(m.conteudo_raw, t.texto) IS NOT NULL) AS mensagens
FROM ml_captura.sessoes_conversa s
JOIN ml_captura.mensagens_raw m ON m.remote_jid = s.remote_jid AND m.area = 'comercial'
LEFT JOIN ml_captura.transcricoes_audio t ON t.mensagem_id = m.id
WHERE
  s.status = 'ativa'
  AND s.area = 'comercial'
  AND s.updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM ml_comercial.conversas c
    WHERE c.sessao_id = s.id
  )
GROUP BY s.id, s.remote_jid, s.area, s.total_mensagens, s.iniciada_em, s.agente_humano_id
HAVING count(m.id) >= 3
LIMIT 10
